headline: Immigration detention centres hold 2,400 children
context: As of February 2025, approximately 2,400 children were held in immigration detention centres across Malaysia, according to UNHCR estimates.

cards.big: 2,400 children detained in 12 immigration depots across Malaysia in 2025
cards.sub: No legal framework separates child detainees from adult populations

cards.big: Immigration Act 1959 Section 34 permits indefinite detention of irregular migrants
cards.sub: No maximum detention period specified for children or adults

cards.big: CRC Article 37 prohibits detention of children except as last resort
cards.sub: Malaysia ratified CRC in 1995 but maintains reservations on key articles

cards.big: NGO visits documented 340 children without access to education in detention
cards.sub: Average detention period for children exceeds 8 months before resolution

cards.big: Locking up 2,400 children as immigration policy is a child rights crisis
Home Ministry proposed alternatives to detention pilot program in December 2024
